MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders balance of case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-09-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Settlement.
Department 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840

Lawrence Murray, Esq., (415-673-0555) appearing for Plaintiff Waiyan MacMillan.
Plaintiff Waiyan MacMillan is present.
Arthur J. Casey, Esq., (408-298-7120) for Defendants Jeremy Houston, Jeffrey Houston, Catherine Houston.
Michael J. Daley, Esq. (925-225-6838) for Defendants Ruth Lee and Roy Lee.

Plaintiff Waiyan MacMillan is sworn and examined.
Benita Selor, of state Farm Insurance is sworn and examined on behalf of Defendants Ruth and Roy Lee.
Sue Nix of Ameriprise is sworn and examined on behalf of Defendant Houston.

After evidence, the Court is satisfied that the settlement is comprehensive and approves the settlement everyone agrees to. The Court ordered the following settlement entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:

That Ameriprise on behalf of the insured, Jeremy Houston will pay $77,500.00 to the Plaintiff Waiyan MacMillan, and that State Farm on behalf of it's insured, Ruth and Roy Lee, will pay $15,000 to the Plaintiff Waiyan MacMillan. Total settlement in the amount of $92,500.00.

Plaintiff's Counsel, Lawrence Murray to submit a settlement signed by all parties involved in the matter within 2-3 weeks.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
